notes: Test connectivity to the Rest API.
Test connectivity and get server time.

params.name: symbol
params.description: Example: curl -X GET "https://api.binance.com/api/v3/exchangeInfo?symbol=BNBBTC"

params.name: symbols
params.description: Examples: curl -X GET "https://api.binance.com/api/v3/exchangeInfo?symbols=%5B%22BNBBTC%22,%22BTCUSDT%22%5D" or curl -g -X GET 'https://api.binance.com/api/v3/exchangeInfo?symbols=["BTCUSDT","BNBBTC"]'

params.name: permissions
params.description: Examples: curl -X GET "https://api.binance.com/api/v3/exchangeInfo?permissions=SPOT" or curl -X GET "https://api.binance.com/api/v3/exchangeInfo?permissions=%5B%22MARGIN%22,%22C%22,%22LEVERAGED%22%5D" or curl -g -X GET 'https://api.binance.com/api/v3/exchangeInfo?permissions=["MARGIN","LEVERAGED"]'

params.name: showPermissionSets
params.description: Controls whether the content of the permissionSets field is populated or not. Defaults to true

params.name: symbolStatus
params.description: Filters for symbols that have this tradingStatus. Valid values: TRADING, HALT, BREAK. Cannot be used in combination with symbols or symbol

notes: Current exchange trading rules and symbol information.

params.name: limit
params.description: Default: 100; Maximum: 5000. If limit > 5000, only 5000 entries will be returned.

params.name: symbolStatus
params.description: Filters for symbols that have this tradingStatus. A status mismatch returns error -1220 SYMBOL_DOES_NOT_MATCH_STATUS. Valid values: TRADING, HALT, BREAK

notes: Order book depth.

params.description: Default 500; max 1000

params.name: strategyType
params.description: The value cannot be less than 1000000.

params.name: trailingDelta
params.description: Used for trailing stop orders.

params.name: pegPriceType
params.description: PRIMARY_PEG or MARKET_PEG. See Pegged Orders.

params.name: pegOffsetValue
params.description: Price level to peg the price to (max: 100). See Pegged Orders.

params.name: pegOffsetType
params.description: Only PRICE_LEVEL is supported. See Pegged Orders.

params.name: computeCommissionRates
params.description: Default: false. See Commissions FAQ to learn more.

params.name: recvWindow
params.description: The value cannot be greater than 60000. Supports up to three decimal places of precision (e.g., 6000.346) so that microseconds may be specified.

notes: Test new order creation and signature/recvWindow. Creates and validates a new order but does not send it into the matching engine.

params.name: recvWindow

notes: Reduce the quantity of an existing open order while maintaining queue priority.

params.name: recvWindow

params.name: recvWindow

notes: Place an OTOCO (One-Triggers-One-Cancels-the-Other) order list. An OTOCO has a working order that triggers 2 pending orders (forming an OCO pair).
